features.featureTitle: Implement a full-screen cinematic welcome popup shown once per session. It must feature: an animated gold particle shimmer/rain effect on deep black background; the Luminia Group logo (image-3.png) fading in at center with a golden glow pulse animation; 'WELCOME TO LUMINIA GROUP CONGLOMERATE' in gold serif capitals with a letter-by-letter reveal animation; a self-drawing thin gold horizontal divider line below the headline; subtitle text 'A Legacy of Excellence' in smaller italic gold below the divider; a glowing gold 'ENTER' button with ripple effect; and a gold burst/dissolve exit transition when the user clicks Enter.

Build the main landing page with a consistent black and gold luxury theme throughout — background obsidian/deep black, all typography in gold or ivory, gold accent lines and dividers. Use the Luminia Group logo (image-3.png) in the navigation bar and footer with a black background behind it.

Display all 7 Luminia subsidiaries as premium gold-bordered cards on the main page in a responsive grid. Each card must show the company name, a fitting tagline, and a gold 'Discover' button. Companies and their domains: (1) Luminia Gadgets — watches, headphones, earbuds; (2) Moda Vestra — fashion and clothing; (3) Velocity Vogue — luggage and travel bags; (4) Luminia Captures — wedding photography and professional photoshoots; (5) Assured Tours & Travels — itineraries, train tickets, flight tickets; (6) Luminia TechLabs — web and app development, GST services; (7) GST Service — GST-related tax and business services.

When a user clicks the 'Discover' button on any subsidiary card, open a full-screen or large modal overlay with a 'Launching Soon' experience. The modal must have: a black background with animated gold border; the subsidiary name in large gold text; 'LAUNCHING SOON' with a shimmer/glow animation; a grid or carousel of relevant imagery for that subsidiary (using the generated images); and a close button in gold.
Use all generated product/service images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them in the respective 'Launching Soon' modals for each subsidiary.
